© 2024 Catgirl.io

The Cryptocurrency that's Pawsitively Adorable

Join the cutest crypto community

About Us

Once upon a time, in May 2021, a playful meme cryptocurrency was born. It revolved around the lovable and hilarious Catgirl, a favourite among anime fans. But that's just the start of the adventure! Catgirl has evolved into a vibrant ecosystem, introducing exciting features and aiming to bring joy and innovation to the crypto world. With a focus on community, we're here to take you on a journey where cuteness rules and laughter fills the air. Get ready to be whisked away into a realm where Catgirl's magic will bring a smile to everyone :)

Our Focus

Our Focus

Express Yourself

Catgirl is not your ordinary cryptocurrency project. Our enchanting virtual world invites you to express yourself freely, allowing your unique style to shine.

CATGIRL¢ Token

At the heart of our ecosystem lies CATGIRL¢, a token with boundless possibilities. We tirelessly craft new utilities and use cases, ensuring its widespread adoption and unlocking its full potential.

Unite in Community

A thriving and engaged community is the key to Catgirl's triumph. We are dedicated to nurturing a warm, inclusive environment where every voice is valued. Join us to share your ideas, collaborate with fellow adventurers, and co-create the extraordinary future of Catgirl together.

Ecosystems

Catgirl App

Prepare to enter a realm of digital wonder with the Catgirl App! This revolutionary platform takes collecting to a new level by transforming your favourite characters and moments into treasured NFTs. Immerse yourself in a world of exciting utilities and unlock the true magic of digital collectibles.

Discover
UniPaws

Welcome to UniPaws, where the metaverse comes alive! This all-encompassing experience invites you to unleash your creativity by creating unique NFT profile pictures that capture your essence. Dive into thrilling games that will whisk you away on unforgettable adventures and collect rewards. Get ready for a paw-some journey like no other!

FunHunt

The ultimate social platform for the Web3 generation! 🚀 Dive into a vibrant, interactive space where crypto enthusiasts unite to share their favorite projects and hunt for new opportunities. Connect with like-minded individuals, spark conversations, and explore the exciting world of crypto together. Join us now and let the fun begin!

Core values

C

Community Care

Our community's satisfaction and happiness are our top priority. We are constantly on the lookout, eager to hear valuable feedback. At Catgirl, we believe in building a place where our community feels valued and cherished.

A

Artistry Allure

Our pursuit of excellence knows no bounds. We join forces with talented artists, collaborating to breathe life into our vision with awe-inspiring artwork. Prepare to be captivated by the enchanting tapestry of creativity unfolding before you.

T

Trustworthy Tales

Trust is the cornerstone of our journey. We pledge unwavering commitment to transparency and ethical practices, never shying away from questioning the norm to uphold what's right for our community and holders.

Community Care

Our community's satisfaction and happiness are our top priority. We are constantly on the lookout, eager to hear valuable feedback. At Catgirl, we believe in building a place where our community feels valued and cherished.

Artistry Allure

Our pursuit of excellence knows no bounds. We join forces with talented artists, collaborating to breathe life into our vision with awe-inspiring artwork. Prepare to be captivated by the enchanting tapestry of creativity unfolding before you.

Trustworthy Tales

Trust is the cornerstone of our journey. We pledge unwavering commitment to transparency and ethical practices, never shying away from questioning the norm to uphold what's right for our community and holders.

Supply

Embracing the principle of decentralization, CATGIRL¢ implemented a fair launch approach to deliver true community ownership while fostering growth through unwavering community support.

Disclaimer

Legal Disclaimer

The information provided on the catgirl.io website does not constitute investment advice, financial advice, trading advice, or any other sort of advice and you should not treat any of the website’s content as such. catgirl.io does not recommend that any cryptocurrency should be bought, sold, or held by you. Do conduct your own due diligence and consult your financial advisor before making any investment decisions. By purchasing CATGIRL¢, you agree that you are not purchasing a security or investment and you agree to hold catgirl.io harmless and not liable for any losses or taxes you may incur. You also agree that catgirl.io is presenting the token “as is” and is not required to provide any support or services. You should have no expectation of any form from catgirl.io. Although CATGIRL¢ is a community driven token for social networking and not a registered digital currency, the team strongly recommends that citizens in areas with government bans on cryptocurrency do not purchase it because catgirl.io cannot ensure compliance with your territory’s regulations. Always make sure that you are in compliance with your local laws and regulations before you make any purchase.

Risk Disclosure

Please note there are always risks associated with smart-contracts. Please use at your own risk. catgirl.io is not a registered broker, analyst, or investment advisor. Everything that’s provided on this site is purely for guidance, informational and educational purposes, and fun. All information contained herein should be independently verified and confirmed. We do not accept any liability for any loss or damage whatsoever caused in reliance upon such information or services. Please be aware of the risks involved with any trading done in any financial market. Do not trade with money that you cannot afford to lose.
